summary: Tested new Dashboard Widgets configuration feature in AppearancePage. All 8 test scenarios passed: section exists, default states correct, toggle/enable/disable works, dashboard reflects changes, Reset (Restablecer) works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard widgets config fully working: (1) Apariencia → Campos Visibles has 'Tarjetas del Dashboard' section with 8 widgets ✓, (2) 4 default enabled (upcoming, total_res, total_events, real_income) ✓, (3) 4 default disabled (completed_inc, advance_inc, monthly_inc, pending_bal) ✓, (4) Toggle enables/disables widgets and Dashboard reflects changes in real-time ✓, (5) Ingreso Completadas shows currency value Q 22,000 ✓, (6) Restablecer resets to 4 default enabled ✓, (7) data-testid='dash-widget-{id}' and 'dash-widget-toggle-{id}' selectors work correctly ✓. HTML5 drag-and-drop is implemented (same pattern as Socios). localStorage key: 'dashboard_widgets'.
